description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a light gray woodgrain finish, featuring two spacious drawers on the front. The drawers are equipped with modern, horizontal bar handles in a contrasting dark color, providing a sleek and functional appearance. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the subtle wood texture without any additional features or hardware. The top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for placing office supplies or small equipment. The overall construction suggests a solid, durable build, likely intended for storing documents or office materials. Its minimalist design makes it suitable for contemporary urban environments such as offices or home workspaces.
description: A light gray woodgrain filing cabinet with two drawers and dark bar handles, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain woodgrain panel with no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a flat, unadorned woodgrain surface with no hardware or openings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with a plain woodgrain panel and no visible features.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting two drawers with dark horizontal bar handles, the main interactive side of the cabinet.
